name: horizon-layer
description: Self-hosted, local-first MCP server for agent memory backed by PostgreSQL + pgvector

scripts.start:http: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/horizon_layer} SERVER_TRANSPORT=http APP_NAME=${APP_NAME:-Horizon Layer} APP_BASE_URL=${APP_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} HOST=${HOST:-127.0.0.1} PORT=${PORT:-3000} node dist/index.js
scripts.dev:http: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/horizon_layer} SERVER_TRANSPORT=http APP_NAME=${APP_NAME:-Horizon Layer} APP_BASE_URL=${APP_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} HOST=${HOST:-127.0.0.1} PORT=${PORT:-3000} tsx src/index.ts
